arts.ttl: Is Hibs vs Aberdeen on TV? Live stream, channel, PPV and team news for Easter Road clash
arts.sum: The game is available on PPV via Hibs TV, with the club saying "International subscribers will get the full game live as part of their package, with no requirement to purchase the PPV option. Hibs vs Aberdeen is not on TV, but punters can still watch the game LIVE.

Second-placed Aberdeen travel to Edinburgh to take on Hibernian, bottom of the Scottish Premiership pile, at Easter Road on Tuesday night with the two teams 23 points apart. Hibs have played a league...

arts.ttl: Graeme Shinnie brands Aberdeen title talk 'madness' as he sets record straight over immediate aim
arts.sum: The Dons skipper is well aware of the title fever sweeping through the Granite City but knows things can change in an instant

arts.ttl: Hibs are Hearts' gift that keeps on giving but we MUST sort it out before they do or we're in big s*** - Ryan Stevenson

arts.sum: The Leith side can climb above rivals Hearts at the foot of the table if they hand Aberdeen a second successive defeat
